dashboard.label: Ring
dashboard.description: Ring hardware, firmware, and battery status
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Ring","description":"Ring hardware, firmware, and battery status","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"}},"dataSources":{"ds_battery_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=battery | timechart span=1h avg(level) as level","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Battery level trend"},"ds_charging_events":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=battery | sort _time | dedup _raw | eval is_charging_evt=if(charging="true" OR in_charger="true", 1, 0) | streamstats reset_on_change=true window=1 current=false last(is_charging_evt) as prev_charging_evt | eval session_start=if(is_charging_evt=1 AND (prev_charging_evt=0 OR isnull(prev_charging_evt)), 1, 0) | streamstats sum(session_start) as session_id | where is_charging_evt=1 | stats earliest(_time) as start_time latest(_time) as end_time earliest(level) as level_start latest(level) as level_end count as samples by session_id | eval duration_min=round((end_time-start_time)/60,1) | eval start_str=strftime(start_time,"%b %d %H:%M") | eval end_str=strftime(end_time,"%b %d %H:%M") | eval level_gained=level_end-level_start | sort -start_time | head 10 | table start_str, end_str, duration_min, level_start, level_end, level_gained | rename start_str as "start", end_str as "end", duration_min as "dur min", level_start as "lvl start", level_end as "lvl end", level_gained as "lvl gain"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Charging sessions"},"ds_ring_config":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=ring_config | sort -_time | head 1 | eval color=replace(color,"_"," "), set_up_at=substr(set_up_at,1,10) | table color, design, hardware_type, firmware_version, size, set_up_at | rename hardware_type as "hw ver", firmware_version as "fw ver", set_up_at as "setup date"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Ring configuration"},"ds_battery_forecast":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=battery_model | sort -_time | head 1 | eval bp=coalesce(breakpoint,60) | table rate_top, rate_bot, bp | appendcols [ search index=oura oura_data_type=battery | sort -_time | head 1 | eval current_level=level | table current_level ] | eval hours_remaining=round(if(current_level>=bp, (current_level-bp)/rate_top + bp/rate_bot, current_level/rate_bot),1) | eval estimated_empty_epoch=now()+(hours_remaining*3600), estimated_empty=strftime(estimated_empty_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | table current_level, hours_remaining, estimated_empty","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Battery time-to-empty forecast"},"ds_model_info":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=battery_model | sort -_time | head 1 | eval rate_top=rate_top." %/hr (>=60%)", rate_bot=rate_bot." %/hr (<60%)" | table trained_at_str, algorithm, rate_top, rate_bot, breakpoint, training_segments","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Battery drain model info"},"ds_charge_status":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura (oura_data_type=battery OR oura_data_type=ring_config) | eval rc=if(oura_data_type="ring_config",color,null()), rd=if(oura_data_type="ring_config",design,null()) | eventstats latest(rc) as ring_color, latest(rd) as ring_design | where oura_data_type="battery" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval mins=round((now()-_time)/60,0), sync_label=case(mins<60, mins." min ago", mins<1440, round(mins/60,0)." hr ago", true(), round(mins/1440,0)." d ago"), sync_color=case(mins<180,"#4CAF50", mins<720,"#F4A422", true(),"#E8503A") | table level, charging, in_charger, ring_color, ring_design, sync_label, sync_color","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Charge status (ring viz)"}},"visualizations":{"battery_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_battery_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":false,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Battery %"},"title":"Battery Level Trend"},"charging_table":{"type":"splunk.table","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_charging_events"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","count":10,"columnFormat":{"start":{"align":"left"},"end":{"align":"left"},"dur min":{"align":"left"},"lvl start":{"align":"left"},"lvl end":{"align":"left"},"lvl gain":{"align":"left"}}},"title":"Recent Charging Sessions"},"config_table":{"type":"splunk.table","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_ring_config"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","count":1,"columnFormat":{"color":{"align":"left"},"design":{"align":"left"},"hw ver":{"align":"left"},"fw ver":{"align":"left"},"size":{"align":"left"},"setup date":{"align":"left"}}},"title":"Ring Hardware Info"},"time_to_empty_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_battery_forecast"},"options":{"majorField":"hours_remaining","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":24,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":24,"to":72,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":72,"to":100000,"value":"#4CAF50"}]},"majorFontSize":48,"label":"Time to Empty (model estimate, current discharge cycle)","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":12,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" hrs","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hours_remaining')","align":"left"},"title":"Time to Empty"},"estimated_empty_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_battery_forecast"},"options":{"majorField":"estimated_empty","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":30,"label":"Estimated Empty (AI Toolkit LinearRegression, retrained weekly)","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":12,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('estimated_empty')","align":"left"},"title":"Estimated Empty Time"},"model_info_table":{"type":"splunk.table","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_model_info"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","count":1,"columnFormat":{"trained_at_str":{"align":"left"},"algorithm":{"align":"left"},"rate_top":{"align":"left"},"rate_bot":{"align":"left"},"breakpoint":{"align":"left"},"training_segments":{"align":"left"}}},"title":"AI Toolkit Model Status"},"chargestatus_viz":{"type":"charge_ring_viz.chargestatus","title":"Charge Status","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_charge_status"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}},"ring_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### About these metrics
- **Charge Status** — current battery level, whether it's on the charger, and how long since the last sync.
- **Time to Empty** — projected hours until the battery drains, from a 2-phase model of your ring's discharge.
- **Drain Model** — learned discharge rates: a faster rate below ~60% and a slower rate above it (batteries drain unevenly), refreshed daily.
- **Charging Sessions** — recent charge cycles: when, how long, and % gained.

**Learn more:** [Oura — Ring Battery Tips](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360046218953-Ring-Battery-Tips)","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"New tab"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"battery_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":400,"y":20,"w":770,"h":360}},{"item":"config_table","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":400,"w":560,"h":220}},{"item":"charging_table","type":"block","position":{"x":600,"y":400,"w":570,"h":220}},{"item":"time_to_empty_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":640,"w":560,"h":170}},{"item":"estimated_empty_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":600,"y":640,"w":570,"h":170}},{"item":"model_info_table","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":830,"w":1150,"h":150}},{"item":"chargestatus_viz","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":360,"h":360}},{"item":"ring_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":1000,"w":1400,"h":210}}],"options":{"width":1180,"height":1230,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}}}}}
